hero_subtitle: SFTY helps digital asset leaders centralize compliance data and workflows to maintain a clear audit trail and evidence record supporting scalable, defensible risk oversight.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Executive oversight fades across compliance workflows
problem_description: Leadership teams struggle to maintain a clear, consolidated view of compliance risks and audit readiness across fragmented systems. This lack of visibility weakens confidence in decision-making and complicates the defense of compliance controls during regulatory or audit reviews.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY unifies compliance data, risk signals, case status, decision logs and audit evidence into a single dashboard, enabling leadership to monitor risk and defensibility across all workflows with clear operational insight.
workflow_title: From case creation to audit evidence
workflow_description: SFTY organizes case data, review actions, decisions and evidence to provide executives with clear visibility into audit defensibility and compliance risk control.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: More than dashboards. Executive audit visibility
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects compliance data, decisions and evidence into one audit-ready view for executives to monitor risk and support defensible reporting across workflows.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY provides VASP leadership with a controlled compliance layer that connects provider data, preserves audit evidence and supports scalable enterprise deployment.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY improve executive audit defensibility visibility
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how compliance decisions generate audit-ready evidence
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit trails support bank due diligence reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY connects provider outputs for leadership
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for executive risk control?
faq_1_answer: SFTY delivers executives a connected compliance operating view that reduces risk, strengthens audit trails and improves visibility across onboarding, KYT, Travel Rule and reporting workflows for VASPs.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY provide audit defensibility?
faq_2_answer: SFTY collects provider outputs, links cases, preserves decision logs and evidence packages to create a defensible audit trail accessible through executive dashboards for risk review and due diligence.
faq_3_question: How are decisions and evidence preserved?
faq_3_answer: All compliance decisions, reviewer actions and supporting evidence are logged and stored within SFTY to support traceability and support inspection-ready review for audits or regulatory inquiries.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one structured compliance layer without disrupting existing workflows or data sources.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY complements rather than replaces providers by turning fragmented outputs into centralized, auditable workflows and reports for regulated digital asset businesses.
final_title: Give executives clear audit defensibility visibility
final_description: Review how SFTY centralizes compliance data and evidence for a connected executive risk oversight and audit-ready control view.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
